name: Ghastly Drape
description: Notes Part of the Skuld 2 The ReGhostening set.
effects: With Full Set: Ghastly Nova Paralyzed enemies for 2.5 seconds and fires more often. While Lethal Strike is active: Releases a Ghastly Nova. Shots: 6 Damage: 50-150 (average: 100) Total Damage: 300-900 (average: 600) Lifetime: 1.1 second Range: 4 tiles Shots hit multiple targets Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 30 (+4 per WIS > 34) and 30% (+0.5% per WIS > 34) of target’s defense as additional damage for 3 seconds MP Cost: 4 MP/proj Cooldown: 0.6 sec
